generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionData
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance ActualPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Actual position values aggregated from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData, SecondaryEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AnalyticalModel_Simulink, AnalyticalModel_Cpp, AnalyticalModel_Java
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity data derived from position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData, SecondaryEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AnalyticalModel_Simulink, AnalyticalModel_Cpp, AnalyticalModel_Java
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis with current (IM) as input"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Standard gear stage followed by cycloidal gear to achieve required low gear ratio"
]

instance StructuralModel_ACME : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural model using ACME for defining components, interfaces, interconnections, and composition"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACME
]

instance StructuralModel_AADL : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural model using AADL for defining components, interfaces, interconnections, and composition"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AADL
]

instance StructuralModel_MontiArc : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural model using MontiArc for defining components, interfaces, interconnections, and composition"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArc
]

instance StructuralModel_SysML_IBDs : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural model using SysML IBDs for component-connector-based system descriptions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance BehavioralModel_MontiArc : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model using MontiArc Automaton"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcAutomaton
]

instance BehavioralModel_SysML : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model using SysML v1.7 state machines"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML_StateMachines
]

instance AnalyticalModel_Simulink : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using MathWorks Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance AnalyticalModel_Cpp : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using C++"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Cpp
]

instance AnalyticalModel_Java : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using Java"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Java
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling and component-connector-based descriptions via IBDs"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterService, VisualizationService
]

instance ACME : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture Description Language for component-connector-based system descriptions"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterService
]

instance AADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture Description Language for component-connector-based system descriptions"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterService
]

instance MontiArc : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture Description Language for component-connector-based system descriptions"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterService
]

instance MontiArcAutomaton : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterService
]

instance SysML_StateMachines : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 state machines for behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterService
]

instance Simulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterService, VisualizationService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for general-purpose programming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterService
]

instance Java : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java for general-purpose programming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterService
]

instance RFLP : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology for managing complexity through layered abstraction"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterService, VisualizationService
]

instance OOSEM : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for managing complexity through layered abstraction"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterService, VisualizationService
]

instance SPES : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for managing complexity through layered abstraction"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterService, VisualizationService
]

instance SMArDT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for managing complexity through layered abstraction"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterService, VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionParameterService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for deriving friction parameters to enhance robot control accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for providing integrated visualization dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) for gearbox to enhance robot control accuracy"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization within unified dashboard for monitoring and optimizing physical system performance"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The lifecycle stages are structured through Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) with distinct abstraction levels including requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layer. Methodologies such as RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics), OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT manage complexity transitions. Governance integrates heterogeneous stakeholders across modeling notations (SysML, ADLs) and tools (Simulink, C++, Java), with sequential steps: problem identification, asset and model analysis, use or creation of calculations/models, and data identification."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated by comparing simulated data against measured data to analyze friction behavior influenced by load and temperature variations. Uncertainty sources include environmental factors affecting friction coefficients, with error detection based on deviations between simulation and physical measurements."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication via MQTT protocol for sensor data streaming, with Asset Administration Shells (AAS) utilized for asset management and interoperability. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance includes SysML for Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE), Unified Modeling Language (UML) for reference model diagrams (Fig. 1), and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for digital asset representation. Interoperability is achieved via Architecture Description Languages (ADLs) such as AADL and MontiArc, adhering to manufacturing and industrial automation standards."
]
